articles.title: Forza Horizon 6 Suffers Disastrous Leak as Steam Preload Files Are Made Available Without Encryption - IGN
articles.description: Forza Horizon 6 suffered a significant leak after the entire game was reportedly made available via an unencrypted Steam preload.

articles.title: Fake OpenAI Privacy Filter Repo Hits #1 on Hugging Face, Draws 244K Downloads - The Hacker News
articles.description: Fake OpenAI Privacy Filter hit #1 on Hugging Face with 244,000 downloads, spreading infostealer malware to Windows users.

articles.title: ‘Not Available For All’—Apple Changes iPhone Messaging This Week - Forbes
articles.description: Apple changes iPhone after 15 years — here's what you need to know.

articles.title: Breaking: Samsung starts rolling out stable One UI 8.5 to Galaxy S25 users in the US - Android Authority
articles.description: Samsung has finally started rolling out the stable One UI 8.5 update to users in the US after releasing it in its home country last week.

articles.title: Meet Lamborghini's Most Powerful Convertible Ever: Fenomeno Roadster - Motor1.com
articles.description: Lamborghini has deleted the Fenomeno's roof for a Roadster version, of which only 15 cars will be built. The open-top supercar is nearly as fast as the coupe

articles.title: GrapheneOS says Google is making life harder for rival operating systems and devices - Android Authority
articles.description: GrapheneOS claims Google's security systems make it harder for alternative operating systems and devices to access apps and online services.
